description_long: This is a large, industrial-style blue metal dumpster with a flat, slightly sloped lid and reinforced edges. The exterior is painted blue with visible weathering, rust, and dirt, giving it a worn, utilitarian appearance. White stenciled text, including a company name and phone number, is present on the lid and sides, indicating commercial use. The lid appears to be a single, solid metal piece with no visible hinges or handles, suggesting it may be lifted off or slid open. The body is trapezoidal, wider at the top and tapering toward the base, with a robust metal frame and riveted construction. There are no visible wheels or handles, and the base sits flat on the ground, making it suitable for stationary placement in urban environments.
description: A large, blue, weathered metal dumpster with a flat lid, stenciled white text, and reinforced edges, designed for stationary waste collection in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the sloped lid, stenciled text, and reinforced metal edges.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the flat, weathered lid and the absence of handles or wheels.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the full length of the lid and the robust, riveted frame.
description_view_3: Front-right view emphasizing the angled lid section and visible company text.
attribute_lid_type: flat, single-section metal lid with no visible hinges or locking mechanisms
